title: post / frontmatter contract
description: The standard every blog post is held to. build.mjs validates each posts/*.md frontmatter against this; a post that doesn't conform can't build — the same invalid-states-unrepresentable boundary the rest of the site uses.

date.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD — published date, drives feed + sort order

description.description: one line, kept ≤160 chars — meta description, index blurb, feed summary

slug.description: URL slug; defaults to the filename

type.description: vault discriminator; optional here so vault drafts copy in unchanged

target.description: publish destination/voice from the vault. This site renders only 'dev' (or absent); 'bounded-tools' is skipped.

syndication.description: POSSE: URLs where this post was syndicated (Medium, dev.to, Mastodon…); rendered as u-syndication backlinks
